creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
(administrative note: the 'maintainer feedback' flag should be set negative I think, because you reject the change. Picking this PR to prevent further duplication).

Samba 3.6 and its slave port net/samba-smbclient will stay for a while because there are around 300 ports that use the net/samba-libsmbclient slave port (directly or indirectly).

Is there any chance that BackupPC will support Samba 4 ?
